name: Tee'd Off Golf
about: Tee'd Off Golf is a new indoor golf simulator venue located in Kent, Ohio, featuring three state-of-the-art simulator bays. Each bay accommodates up to four players, offering a space for both serious golfers looking to improve their game and groups seeking a fun activity. The facility provides an AI swing analysis trainer for personalized improvement and a variety of virtual golf courses. Pricing is structured at $50 per hour per bay for simulator time and $70 per hour for AI training sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with AI swing analysis
Flexible booking for individuals and groups up to four per bay
Variety of virtual golf courses from around the world
On-site rental clubs and provided golf balls for convenience
Extended weekend hours for flexible play times

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and cold food available for purchase
No alcohol served at this time

faq.question: Do I need to bring clubs?
faq.answer: Bring your own clubs, or rental clubs are available for $10 per set. Balls are always provided.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: Food and drinks must remain at designated chairs. No food or beverages are allowed inside the simulator bay or near computers/electronics. Beverages and snacks are available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes approximately 2 hours for 4 people to play 9 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Children under age 14 must be accompanied by an adult at all times, making the venue suitable for families with supervision.
